title: Payment on completion
content:
Wages of an employee on completion of his contract of 
employment and any other sum payable in respect of his contract 
shall be due to him on the day of the completion of the contract 
and shall be paid as soon as is practicable but in any case not later 
than 7 days thereafter.

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
